title: Offer and acceptance
summary: 9084 Contract — invitation to treat, communication, revocation, and acceptance rules.
learningObjectives: Distinguish offers from invitations to treat.
Explain communication and revocation of offers.
Analyse acceptance rules: mirror image, postal, instantaneous.
Apply cases: Carlill, Partridge, Hyde v Wrench, Brinkibon.

simpleExplanation.title: Agreement through offer and acceptance
simpleExplanation.summary: An offer is a firm promise to be bound; acceptance must match exactly and be communicated — special rules apply to post and email.
steps: Offer — specific, communicated, intent to contract.
Postal rule — acceptance on posting (Adams v Lindsell).

sections.content: **Offer and acceptance** (3.1.2) — core for problem Qs. Work **offer → acceptance → timing**.

sections.label: Mark an offer and acceptance question
